value.found_quote: Include keys from `OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES` as attributes on metric datapoints
value.rationale: The claim is about tagging telemetry from the agent — overriding service name and adding resource attributes. The page describes Claude Code's OpenTelemetry telemetry export, including the use of OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES to add resource attributes to metric datapoints (via OTEL_METRICS_INCLUDE_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES). This standard OTel mechanism covers both adding resource attributes and overriding the service name (service.name is a standard resource attribute). The page substantiates that telemetry can be tagged/configured with resource attributes, and these are standard, supported OpenTelemetry configuration options described in the documentation.
